name: oracle-suite
description: A working-session toolkit by Not Rest Inc.: ORACLE session intake, a deep researcher, a market researcher, a step-by-step planner, a copy-paste runbook builder, an adversarial critic, a director that chains them into pipelines, and a session-end handoff — bookended by a shared CLAUDE.md foundation so sessions stay continuous — with automated continuity hooks (SessionStart resume detection, PreCompact handoff reminder) and a live cross-session handoff line.
